description: Club fingerprints: five derived metrics per active club (attack, defence, finals games, home win-rate, away win-rate), shown as faceted small-multiple bars normalised to a shared max.

transform.calculate: datum.home_team == 'Brisbane Broncos' ? 'Broncos' :datum.home_team == 'Melbourne Storm' ? 'Storm' :datum.home_team == 'Penrith Panthers' ? 'Panthers' :datum.home_team == 'Parramatta Eels' ? 'Eels' :datum.home_team == 'South Sydney Rabbitohs' ? 'Rabbitohs' :(datum.home_team == 'Sydney Roosters' || datum.home_team == 'Sydney City Roosters') ? 'Roosters' :datum.home_team == 'Manly Warringah Sea Eagles' ? 'Sea Eagles' :datum.home_team == 'Canberra Raiders' ? 'Raiders' :datum.home_team == 'Newcastle Knights' ? 'Knights' :datum.home_team == 'North Queensland Cowboys' ? 'Cowboys' :datum.home_team == 'St George Illawarra Dragons' ? 'Dragons' :datum.home_team == 'St George Dragons' ? 'St George' :datum.home_team == 'Illawarra Steelers' ? 'Illawarra' :(datum.home_team == 'Canterbury Bankstown Bulldogs' || datum.home_team == 'Bulldogs') ? 'Bulldogs' :(datum.home_team == 'Cronulla Sutherland Sharks' || datum.home_team == 'Sharks') ? 'Sharks' :datum.home_team == 'Wests Tigers' ? 'Wests Tigers' :datum.home_team == 'Western Suburbs Magpies' ? 'Western Suburbs' :datum.home_team == 'Balmain Tigers' ? 'Balmain' :(datum.home_team == 'Auckland Warriors' || datum.home_team == 'New Zealand Warriors' || datum.home_team == 'Warriors') ? 'Warriors' :datum.home_team == 'Gold Coast Chargers' ? 'Gold Coast Chargers' :datum.home_team == 'Gold Coast Titans' ? 'Titans' :datum.home_team == 'Dolphins' ? 'Dolphins' :datum.home_team == 'North Sydney Bears' ? 'North Sydney' :datum.home_team == 'Adelaide Rams' ? 'Adelaide Rams' :datum.home_team == 'Northern Eagles' ? 'Northern Eagles' :datum.home_team

datum.away_team == 'Brisbane Broncos' ? 'Broncos' :datum.away_team == 'Melbourne Storm' ? 'Storm' :datum.away_team == 'Penrith Panthers' ? 'Panthers' :datum.away_team == 'Parramatta Eels' ? 'Eels' :datum.away_team == 'South Sydney Rabbitohs' ? 'Rabbitohs' :(datum.away_team == 'Sydney Roosters' || datum.away_team == 'Sydney City Roosters') ? 'Roosters' :datum.away_team == 'Manly Warringah Sea Eagles' ? 'Sea Eagles' :datum.away_team == 'Canberra Raiders' ? 'Raiders' :datum.away_team == 'Newcastle Knights' ? 'Knights' :datum.away_team == 'North Queensland Cowboys' ? 'Cowboys' :datum.away_team == 'St George Illawarra Dragons' ? 'Dragons' :datum.away_team == 'St George Dragons' ? 'St George' :datum.away_team == 'Illawarra Steelers' ? 'Illawarra' :(datum.away_team == 'Canterbury Bankstown Bulldogs' || datum.away_team == 'Bulldogs') ? 'Bulldogs' :(datum.away_team == 'Cronulla Sutherland Sharks' || datum.away_team == 'Sharks') ? 'Sharks' :datum.away_team == 'Wests Tigers' ? 'Wests Tigers' :datum.away_team == 'Western Suburbs Magpies' ? 'Western Suburbs' :datum.away_team == 'Balmain Tigers' ? 'Balmain' :(datum.away_team == 'Auckland Warriors' || datum.away_team == 'New Zealand Warriors' || datum.away_team == 'Warriors') ? 'Warriors' :datum.away_team == 'Gold Coast Chargers' ? 'Gold Coast Chargers' :datum.away_team == 'Gold Coast Titans' ? 'Titans' :datum.away_team == 'Dolphins' ? 'Dolphins' :datum.away_team == 'North Sydney Bears' ? 'North Sydney' :datum.away_team == 'Adelaide Rams' ? 'Adelaide Rams' :datum.away_team == 'Northern Eagles' ? 'Northern Eagles' :datum.away_team

[ {axis:'ATK',  v: datum.atk,           maxV: 30,  label: format(datum.atk, '.1f') + ' pts/g'},  {axis:'DEF',  v: datum.def,           maxV: 30,  label: format(datum.def_avg, '.1f') + ' conceded'},  {axis:'FIN',  v: datum.finals_games,  maxV: 60,  label: datum.finals_games + ' finals games'},  {axis:'HOM',  v: datum.home_wr,       maxV: 1,   label: format(datum.home_wr, '.0%') + ' home WR'},  {axis:'AWY',  v: datum.away_wr,       maxV: 1,   label: format(datum.away_wr, '.0%') + ' away WR'} ]
